name: Chaurice (2) (Cajun Pork Sausage Making)
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Boneless pork shoulder, cut into cubes or strips
3/4 lb Chilled pork fat, cut into cubes or stripes
1 1/2 tsp Crushed dried red hot pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat sausage casings that have been soaked and rinsed.
2. Grind the pork and pork fat using a medium grinder and transfer to a large mixing bowl.
3. Add chopped onion, finely chopped garlic, parsley, crushed dried red hot pepper, salt, fresh ground black pepper, cayenne, crumbled leaf thyme, and ground allspice to the mixture. Mix well.
4. Refrigerate for at least 12 hours, stirring once or twice to allow flavors to develop.
5. Once sufficiently chilled, grind the mixture and stuff it into hog casings using a stuffer attachment. Tie off into links measuring 4-5 inches each.
6. Cook the sausage immediately or refrigerate for up to 4-5 days. For longer storage, freeze the sausages.
